button.confirm: Are you sure you want to create a new APU?
button.name: create_apu

button.confirm: Are you sure you want to resequence the concepts?
button.name: exe_resequential

form.div:
Warning
: Total of measurements cannot be negative.

sheet.div:
FUNCIONES
: Para funciones usaremos el simbolo de (%) en el código, y solo debera ingresar en el campo "Precio" el valor del % a efectuar. Si desea filtrar por cierto tipo de concepto use (*). Ejemplo (*Q para equipos, *M para materiales, *L para mano de obra, *A para funciones/administrativas)

ERROR
: You cannot create a concept of type material, labor or equipment under a parent of type chapter.

ERROR
: You cannot create a concept of type departure under a parent of type departure.

ERROR
: You cannot create a concept under a parent of type material,labor,equipment or function.

field.invisible: type == False or type not in ['labor', 'equip', 'material','subcontract']
field.name: product_id

field.invisible: type != 'departure' or performance_calculation == False or performance_type == 'hours'
field.name: hours_day

field.invisible: to_certify == False or auto_certify == True or manual_certify == True
field.name: type_cert
stage_id
field.readonly: parent.allow_certification == False and (type_certify == 'fixed' or to_certify == True)
